§1.1.title: Career Objective
§1.1.text: Solution-oriented software professional with 8.5 years of experience in backend development, test automation, and cloud technologies. Seeking a challenging position to leverage strong technical skills and deliver high-quality solutions in a dynamic environment.

§1.2.title: Skills
§1.2.text:
Backend Development: REST APIs with .NET Core C# and MS SQL
Test Automation: Selenium WebDriver, Playwright, NUnit, MSTest
Cloud: Microsoft Azure (App Services, Service Bus, Key Vault)
CI/CD: Azure DevOps, GitHub Actions
Tools: Postman, JIRA, Git, Visual Studio

§1.3.title: Experience
§1.3.text:
Senior Software Engineer — Synechron Technologies (2019–Present)
Responsible for backend API development using .NET Core C# and MS SQL. Led end-to-end test automation framework development using Selenium and Playwright. Deployed services on Microsoft Azure. Collaborated with cross-functional teams in BFSI domain projects.

Test Engineer — Capgemini (2016–2019)
Developed and maintained automated test suites for banking applications. Performed functional, regression, and integration testing. Worked within Agile SCRUM teams.

§1.4.title: Strengths
§1.4.text: Strong analytical and problem-solving skills. Excellent team player with good communication. Quick learner and adaptable to new technologies. Detail-oriented with a focus on code quality.

§1.5.title: Achievements / Certifications
§1.5.text:
Microsoft Certified: Azure Fundamentals (AZ-900)
Best Team Player Award — Synechron Technologies Q3 2022

§1.6.title: Education
§1.6.text:
Bachelor of Engineering (Computer Science)
Gujarat Technological University, 2016
